title: PlanResult
description:
Schema for the JSON object returned by single-plan / loop-incremental-plan / plan-repair prompts (prompts/single_plan_execution_prompt.md, prompts/loop_incremental_plan_prompt.md, prompts/plan_repair_prompt.md). Mirrors `SinglePlanEnvelope` (crates/clawd/src/agent_engine.rs) and the `AgentAction` enum (crates/clawd/src/runtime/types.rs) and is enforced by the `plan_result_schema_drift` unit test in `crates/clawd/src/agent_engine/planning.rs`.

§D2 (schema-driven prompt I/O 第二份样板, after intent_normalizer): the planner returns either an envelope `{steps: [...]}` or a bare action array. Each step is an `AgentAction` discriminated by `type`. `args` is intentionally `Value` (free-form) — per-skill arg shape is governed downstream by `skills_registry.toml` rather than this schema. As of §7.4, the plan grammar also allows `{"type":"synthesize_answer"}` as a runtime-owned evidence-to-answer node so the planner no longer has to hand-write fragile `call_skill(chat, text=...)` transform prompts.

steps.description: Ordered list of plan steps. Each item is an `AgentAction` keyed by `type`.

planner_notes.description: Free-text rationale, surfaced into journal but not consumed by the executor.

structured_field_selector.description: Optional comma-separated machine field selector for exact structured delivery. Use null when no named machine fields were requested.

skill.description: Skill name; must exist in configs/skills_registry.toml under `[skills.<name>]`.

args.description: Free-form per-skill argument bag. Shape is enforced by skill manifest, not by this schema.

tool.description: Built-in tool name (read_file / write_file / run_cmd / fs_search / ...).

capability.description: Semantic capability name resolved by runtime before execution, for example filesystem.list_entries or system.run_command.

args.description: Free-form capability argument bag. Shape is resolved and validated downstream by capability resolver and tool contracts.

evidence_refs.description: Optional symbolic references to prior observed outputs or step ids that should be prioritized during runtime-owned answer synthesis.

content.description: User-visible message body. Planner-stage Respond steps are still checked by runtime delivery classifiers and output contracts before publication; placeholder or pre-observation content must be grounded by prior observed evidence or a synthesize_answer step.

terminal_intent.description: Optional machine terminal intent for the respond step. Runtime records this as structured state; it is not a rendered user reply.

clarify_reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code when terminal_intent is clarify.

missing_slot.description: Stable missing slot token when terminal_intent is clarify.

message_key.description: Optional i18n message key for downstream language rendering.

field_path.description: Optional structured field path related to the missing slot.

locator_kind.description: Optional machine locator kind related to the missing slot.
